purpose: A resume is a commercial document: its job is to generate interview requests, not to catalog every task.
Hiring managers care about impact and results, not just duties.
For Google: ruthlessly edit for space efficiency - maximum 1 page for most positions.

best_practice.pattern: Action – Number – Method (also known as X-Y-Z formula)
best_practice.description: Use the Action – Number – Method pattern to show measurable impact and stand out.
best_practice.formula: Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]

components.action: What you did (improved, reduced, built, automated, grew)
components.number: Quantify the outcome (30% faster, 5x throughput, saved 20 hours/week, 10% QoQ)
components.method: How you did it (via refactoring, deploying clusters, automation, mapping solutions)

common_bullet_styles_and_issues.problem: Too vague — doesn't show how well you did it.
Looks like a job description; doesn't prove ability or results.
Focuses on company structure, not your contributions.
common_bullet_styles_and_issues.exception: Promoted / Selected to Join → shows recognition of your performance.

format.length: Maximum 1 page (technical/engineering with many projects may use 2)
format.style: PDF, black text, clean simple consistent font, bullet points only
format.contact_info: Include GitHub link for technical positions at top
format.line_breaks: If bullet spills to second line by 1-2 words, rewrite shorter

content_structure.recent_graduates: Education before experience. Include: school, degree, major, GPA, graduation month/year
content_structure.experienced_professionals: Experience before education (reverse chronological). Less college detail as time passes
content_structure.technical_positions: GitHub link at top, programming languages listed prominently, languages used per project/experience

google_specific_rules.jargon_rule: Only use shorthand (like 'QoQ') if 100% certain reviewer will understand

membership.ok: Member of Leadership for Tomorrow Society
membership.better: Selected as one of 275 for this 12-month professional development program for high-achieving diverse talent
membership.best: Selected as one of 275 participants nationwide for this 12-month professional development program for high-achieving diverse talent based on leadership potential and academic success

technical_achievement.better: Won second place out of 50 teams in hackathon
technical_achievement.best: Won second place out of 50 teams in hackathon at NJ Tech by working with two colleagues to develop an app that synchronizes mobile calendars

business_impact.ok: Grew revenue for small and medium business clients
business_impact.better: Grew revenue for small and medium business clients by 10% QoQ
business_impact.best: Grew revenue for 15 small and medium business clients by 10% QoQ by mapping new software features as solutions to their business goals

key_takeaways: Performance beats duties — focus on impact, not tasks.
Promotions matter — include them as proof of achievement.
Avoid filler bullets — administrative/organizational details don't get interviews.
Ruthless editing for space efficiency - most relevant items first.
Recent/relevant over comprehensive - tailor for each position.
Show impact and results, not just responsibilities.

llm.llm_instruction: You are an expert resume coach specializing in Google-style resumes. Your job is to work collaboratively with the user to review and improve their resume content, using the best practices and key learnings provided. Ask clarifying questions if any details are unclear or need more context. Focus on making each bullet impactful, quantifiable, and results-oriented using the X-Y-Z formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z]). Ensure all information is 100% accurate and truthful—never make up or exaggerate details. Apply ruthless editing for space efficiency, aiming for maximum 1 page. Suggest rewrites or enhancements, and confirm changes with the user to maximize interview potential. For technical positions, ensure programming languages and GitHub links are prominently displayed.
